name: Pre-existing back pain flared up at work in Idaho, can I claim it?
description: Yes, covers work aggravation of pre-existing issues.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing back pain flared up at work in Idaho, can I claim it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers work aggravation of pre-existing issues.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if work aggravated it, Idaho comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions.[1] Work must be substantial factor.[1] Key factors: medical opinion links aggravation; records before/after; no need to prove new injury.[2] See doctor promptly, report fully, attorney proves causation against denials.[3] Common in repetitive jobs.
